data.title: Agility Robotics Becomes Agility, Expanding Its Reach Across Emerging Use Cases
data.description: Agility Robotics, formerly known as Agility, has recently undergone a name change to reflect the company's focus on humanoid automation. This change signifies a notable shift in the company's identity as it progresses towards the future of automation.

data.title: New CEO Buys $15 Million In Stock, Berkshire Restarts Buybacks
data.description: Berkshire Hathaway has restarted its buyback program, as indicated by SEC filings. The company's new CEO recently purchased $15 million worth of stock, marking a return to its traditional practice of repurchasing shares.

data.title: NASA Updates Moon Mission Timeline, Taps Alliance For Key Rocket Part
data.description: NASA has made the decision to switch from Boeing to United Launch Alliance for its upcoming moon mission rocket, following a helium flow issue. This change has prompted the agency to update its timeline for the mission. The specific details and numbers regarding the timeline adjustment and the partnership with United Launch Alliance have not been disclosed. The news source, Investor's Business Daily, covered the story.

data.title: JD Stock Falls After Q4 Earnings Miss. Food-Delivery Battle Is Sinking Profits.
data.description: Shares of JD, a prominent e-commerce company in China, experienced a notable decrease following a substantial drop in earnings. The decline in stock value occurred after JD reported disappointing fourth-quarter financial results. The company's profits were negatively impacted by intense competition in the food delivery sector. This news was featured in a report on Investor's Business Daily.
